items.title: My patients use ChatGPT for therapy. Now I use it too | Sarah Dargouth
items.summary: I can’t blame my patients for turning to its straightforward assessments. But it has real risks – and care may require human messiness“Chat told me I should break up with him.”I instructed my face to remain therapist-neutral, but I must have smirked. The truth is, I was annoyed.

items.title: "Lately I have felt so disconnected from everything. I have felt in pain a lot and I don't know why": Artists and fans shower Yungblud with love after emotional response to "industry plant" accusations

items.title: Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin
items.summary: The post Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin appeared first on Goldenplec.com Gurriers at The Button Factory, Dublin on Friday December 19th, 2026 Gurriers, the last diamond to be forged from Ireland’s post-punk scene before the mine collapsed, played two sold-out shows in The Button Factory this week on a landmark occasion for a group who have outgrown their sweaty club origins.
